title: 全球网民抵制OpenAI，克劳德禁令背后引发数十亿政治捐款民愤
description: 美国陆军部刚刚将 Anthropic 列入黑名单，OpenAI 趁虚而入！
titleZh: 全球网民抵制OpenAI，克劳德禁令背后引发数十亿政治捐款民愤
titleEn: Global Netizens Launch Boycott Against OpenAI, Public Fury Ignited Over Billions in Political Donations Behind Claude's Ban
descriptionZh: 美国陆军部刚刚将 Anthropic 列入黑名单，OpenAI 趁虚而入！
descriptionEn: The U.S. War Department just blacklisted Anthropic, and OpenAI swooped in to take advantage! OpenAI set up the same security red line, only requiring cloud deployment of the model, and snatched Anthropic's order. Recalling last month's news that OpenAI's president donated $25 million (approx. 170 million RMB) to Trump's team, becoming one of his largest donors, some netizens question whether this ban is orchestrated by OpenAI using political donations behind the scenes. Global netizens' anger is ignited, calling for uninstalling ChatGPT and switching to subscribing to Claude, which has now surged to the top of the App Store charts.

descriptionEn: Perhaps in the future of AI, the art of escaping control will no longer be retreating to the mountains, but going permanently offline.
